tools.name: hwpforge_convert
tools.description: Convert Markdown to a Korean HWPX document (KS X 6101 standard). Supports GFM tables, images, headings, and Korean typography. Returns the output file path and document summary.

markdown.description: Markdown file path or inline content.

is_file.description: Whether `markdown` is a file path (true) or inline content (false). Default: true.

output_path.description: Output HWPX file path. Must end with `.hwpx`.

tools.name: hwpforge_from_json
tools.description: Create an HWPX document directly from a JSON structure (ExportedDocument schema). Use when building documents programmatically without Markdown. Get the schema from hwpforge_to_json output. For large documents, prefer hwpforge_to_json + hwpforge_patch workflow with file paths instead of inline JSON.

structure.description:
JSON string matching the ExportedDocument schema.
Use hwpforge_to_json output as a reference for the structure.

output_path.description: Output HWPX file path. Must end with `.hwpx`.

tools.name: hwpforge_inspect
tools.description: Inspect an HWPX document structure. Returns section count, paragraph counts, tables, images, charts, headers, footers, and page numbers per section.

file_path.description: Path to the HWPX file to inspect.

styles.description: Reserved for future use. When true, will include style details. Currently ignored.

tools.name: hwpforge_patch
tools.description: Replace a section in an existing HWPX file with edited JSON data. Preserves images and styles from the base file. Use after hwpforge_to_json for surgical edits.

base_path.description: Path to the base HWPX file.

section_json_path.description: Path to the JSON file containing the replacement section.

tools.name: hwpforge_restyle
tools.description: Apply a different style template (preset) to an existing HWPX document. Replaces fonts and paragraph styles while preserving document content and structure. Use hwpforge_templates to discover available presets.

file_path.description: Path to the source HWPX file.

preset.description: Style preset name to apply. Use hwpforge_templates to see available presets.

output_path.description: Output HWPX file path. Must end with `.hwpx`.

tools.name: hwpforge_templates
tools.description: List available style presets (templates) for HWPX document generation. Returns preset names, descriptions, fonts, and page sizes. Call before hwpforge_convert to choose a preset.

name.description: Filter by preset name. Omit to list all presets.

tools.name: hwpforge_to_json
tools.description: Export HWPX to JSON for editing. Use section parameter (0-based) to extract a single section for token efficiency. Returns JSON inline or writes to file.

file_path.description: Path to the HWPX file to export.

section.description: Extract only a specific section (0-based index). Omit for full document.

output_path.description: Output JSON file path. If omitted, returns JSON inline.

tools.name: hwpforge_to_md
tools.description: Convert an HWPX document to Markdown. Extracts text, headings, tables, and images from the HWPX file. Returns the path to the generated Markdown file and any extracted image files.

file_path.description: Path to the HWPX file to convert.

output_dir.description:
Output directory for the generated Markdown and image files.
Defaults to the same directory as the input file.

tools.name: hwpforge_validate
tools.description: Validate an HWPX file structure and integrity. Returns validation status, section/paragraph counts, and any issues found. Use to verify files before editing or after generation.

file_path.description: Path to the HWPX file to validate.
